api: Apple Search Ads Campaign Management API v5, https://api.searchads.apple.com/api/v5
scope: Campaign Management read scope: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (campaigns, ad groups, targeting keywords, ads). Creative sets, reporting endpoints, ACL discovery, and mutating campaign-management endpoints remain excluded because the current connector has no write surface and the additional read endpoints either require selector/report request bodies handled by the existing StreamHook scope or introduce resource families legacy never synced. adgroups/keywords/ads are declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is POST for Apple's .../find selector-body search endpoints) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design §E.1 rule 4; monday's and plaid's api_surface.json document the identical convention for their own POST-verb read endpoints) -- these are read-only record listings (a POST-with-body search, not a mutation), and this bundle's Write always rejects with an unsupported-operation error.

excluded.reason: campaign creation is a mutation and this connector is intentionally read-only; no reverse-ETL write action is exposed
campaign updates are mutations and this connector is intentionally read-only; no reverse-ETL write action is exposed
creative-set search uses the same selector-body read family as the hook-covered streams but is a separate resource family not implemented by legacy or this bundle
campaign reporting requires report selector/body semantics outside the existing StreamHook scope; this bundle only syncs campaign-management entity records
ACL discovery enumerates organization access/permissions rather than campaign entity records and may require broader account-management scope
